**Bottom line:** This feature request cannot be implemented as written. It directly contradicts two production invariants — the single-carrier guarantee and the supervisor-only reassignment rule. These aren't policy preferences; they are system guarantees that downstream processes depend on.

The path forward is a **design conversation**, not implementation. The product team needs to decide whether they want to relax existing invariants (high risk, high blast radius) or introduce a new aggregate structure (ShipmentGroup → child Shipments) that preserves the invariants while enabling multi-carrier fulfillment. Until that decision is made and the sub-shipment lifecycle is fully specified, writing code would be building on a contradictory foundation.
